name: n8n-nodes-dynamic-http
description: n8n community node for dynamic HTTP requests with credential selection per item

scripts.build: tsc && gulp build:icons && npm run postbuild
scripts.postbuild: mkdir -p dist/nodes/DynamicHttpWithCredentials && mv dist/DynamicHttpWithCredentials.node.js dist/nodes/DynamicHttpWithCredentials/ 2>/dev/null || true && mv dist/DynamicHttpWithCredentials.node.d.ts dist/nodes/DynamicHttpWithCredentials/ 2>/dev/null || true && cp nodes/DynamicHttpWithCredentials/icon.svg dist/nodes/DynamicHttpWithCredentials/ 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run lint -s
